title: Rotary Washing Line Cover Waterproof Fabric - Heavy Duty Rotary Clothes Line Cover with Zip - Protective Weather Resistant Parasol Cover for Garden Dryer and Airer (Black)
features: ROBUST MATERIAL: Made with hard-wearing polyester heavy-duty fabric, Flatro rotary line waterproof cover is an amazing clothes line cover; durable material won’t tear or wear out

ULTIMATE PROTECTION: The fabric of this rotary line cover is strong, durable, long-lasting and hard-wearing for outdoor airer protections; washing line cover can resist weather, such as rain, snow, and winds
ZIP CLOSURE: The washing line cover with zip keeps the airer intact and makes fastening easier: Flatro waterproof washing line cover is very easy to fit and remove as it comes with a drawstring
MULTIPURPOSE: Flatro washing line cover can also be used as small parasol cover, clothes airer cover, rotary dryer cover; portable and easy to carry clothes dryer cover
UNIVERSAL FIT: This washing line rotary cover is perfect for almost all rotary washing lines; the size is 165 x 15 x 15 cm approximately
description: Product Description Before vs. After Before Without a rotary cover, your rotary line can get damaged by rain, dirt, and dust. This can make it look worn out and shorten its lifespan. After With a rotary cover, your rotary line stays safe from the elements. It helps keep it clean and in good condition for longer. The video showcases the product in use. It helps keep your rotary line clean and safe from weather damage. How do I use the rotary cover? Simply place it over the rotary line and secure it with the zip and drawstring. Will it fit my rotary line? The adjustable drawstring makes it suitable for most rotary lines. Can it handle strong winds? The secure fit helps it stay in place during windy days.
